name: Apple iPhone 15 Pro Max - 256GB - Natural Titanium
description: The iPhone 15 Pro Max features a 6.7-inch Super Retina XDR display with ProMotion and an aerospace-grade titanium design. Powered by the A17 Pro chip, it delivers console-level gaming and a groundbreaking 5x optical zoom camera system.
features: A17 Pro chip with 6-core GPU for console-level gaming
48MP main camera with 5x optical zoom telephoto
Titanium design with Action Button
USB-C with USB 3 speeds for fast data transfer
All-day battery life with up to 29 hours of video playback

name: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra - 256GB - Titanium Gray
description: The Galaxy S24 Ultra is Samsung's most powerful smartphone with a built-in S Pen and Galaxy AI features. It boasts a stunning 6.8-inch QHD+ Dynamic AMOLED display with titanium frame construction for premium durability.
features: Galaxy AI with Live Translate, Circle to Search, and Chat Assist
200MP wide camera with advanced Nightography
Built-in S Pen with improved latency
Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 for Galaxy processor
5000mAh battery with 45W super fast charging

name: Google Pixel 8 Pro - 128GB - Obsidian
description: The Pixel 8 Pro is Google's most advanced phone, built with Google AI from the inside out. With the powerful Tensor G3 chip and Pro-level camera system, it delivers the best photo and video experience on a Pixel.
features: Google Tensor G3 chip with on-device AI
50MP main camera with Pro-level controls and Magic Eraser
Super Actua 6.7-inch LTPO OLED display up to 120Hz
7 years of OS and security updates
Temperature sensor and advanced health features

name: Apple iPhone 15 - 128GB - Blue
description: iPhone 15 features the Dynamic Island, a 48MP camera, and USB-C connectivity. The color-infused glass and aluminum design is durable and beautiful, while the A16 Bionic chip delivers incredible performance.
features: Dynamic Island for alerts, Live Activities, and more
48MP main camera with 2x telephoto and Smart HDR 5
A16 Bionic chip for fast performance
USB-C connectivity for universal charging
Ceramic Shield front for drop protection

name: Samsung Galaxy A54 5G - 128GB - Awesome Graphite
description: The Galaxy A54 5G delivers flagship features at a mid-range price with a vibrant Super AMOLED display and versatile triple camera. Its water-resistant design and long-lasting battery make it a reliable daily companion.
features: 6.4-inch FHD+ Super AMOLED display with 120Hz refresh rate
50MP OIS main camera with Nightography
5000mAh battery with 25W fast charging
IP67 water and dust resistance
4 generations of OS upgrades and 5 years of security updates

name: Google Pixel 7a - 128GB - Charcoal
description: The Pixel 7a brings Google's AI-powered camera magic and Tensor G2 performance to a more accessible price point. It features a smooth 90Hz OLED display, wireless charging, and the same powerful AI photo features as the flagship Pixels.
features: Google Tensor G2 chip with Titan M2 security
64MP main camera with Super Res Zoom and Magic Eraser
6.1-inch FHD+ OLED display with 90Hz refresh rate
Wireless charging and all-day battery
VPN by Google One included at no extra cost

name: Motorola Edge (2024) - 256GB - Midnight Blue
description: The Motorola Edge 2024 features a stunning 6.6-inch pOLED display with 144Hz refresh rate and Snapdragon 7s Gen 2 power. With a 50MP camera system powered by Google AI and Moto AI, it captures stunning photos in any condition.
features: 6.6-inch pOLED display with 144Hz refresh rate
50MP main camera with optical image stabilization
Snapdragon 7s Gen 2 processor
5000mAh battery with 68W TurboPower charging
Moto AI and Google AI integration

name: OnePlus 12 - 256GB - Flowy Emerald
description: The OnePlus 12 is a flagship killer powered by the Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 and co-developed with Hasselblad for a stunning camera experience. Its 2K ProXDR display and 100W SUPERVOOC charging deliver premium performance at a competitive price.
features: Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 with up to 12GB RAM
4th Gen Hasselblad camera system with 50MP main sensor
6.82-inch 2K ProXDR Display with 120Hz LTPO
100W SUPERVOOC wired + 50W wireless charging
5400mAh battery for all-day power

name: Motorola Moto G Power (2024) - 128GB - Pale Lilac
description: The Moto G Power 2024 brings incredible value with a massive battery and smooth 120Hz display. Its 50MP camera system and clean Android experience make it one of the best budget smartphones available.
features: 6.7-inch FHD+ IPS LCD display with 120Hz refresh rate
50MP main camera with Quad Pixel technology
5000mAh battery with 30W TurboPower charging
MediaTek Dimensity 7020 processor
Water-repellent design with IP52 rating

name: Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 5 - 256GB - Mint
description: The Galaxy Z Flip 5 redefines the flip phone with a large 3.4-inch Flex Window for quick interactions without opening. Its compact, pocketable design unfolds to a stunning 6.7-inch Dynamic AMOLED display for a full smartphone experience.
features: 3.4-inch Flex Window for notifications and widgets
6.7-inch FHD+ Dynamic AMOLED 2X main display at 120Hz
Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 for Galaxy processor
12MP dual camera with FlexCam for hands-free selfies
IPX8 water resistance in a foldable design

name: Apple iPhone 15 Pro Max Clear Case with MagSafe
description: The Apple Clear Case with MagSafe is designed specifically for iPhone 15 Pro Max, showing off its natural titanium finish while providing scratch resistance. Built-in magnets align perfectly with MagSafe accessories for easy attachment.
features: Clear polycarbonate and flexible materials for slim protection
Built-in MagSafe magnets for seamless accessory compatibility
Scratch-resistant coating inside and out
Designed to fit precisely with iPhone 15 Pro Max
Supports wireless charging without removal

name: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra Silicone Case with Ring - Dark Violet
description: Samsung's official Silicone Case for the Galaxy S24 Ultra provides a comfortable grip and reliable protection with a built-in ring for secure handling. The soft-touch silicone finish resists fingerprints and provides all-around coverage.
features: Built-in ring stand for hands-free viewing and secure grip
Soft-touch silicone exterior resists fingerprints
Raised bezels protect screen and camera from scratches
Precise cutouts for ports, buttons, and S Pen access
Slim profile adds minimal bulk

name: Belkin ShieldForce Case for iPhone 15 - Frosted White
description: The Belkin ShieldForce Case offers military-grade drop protection up to 10 feet in a sleek, frosted design. Its antimicrobial treatment reduces bacteria on the case surface, and it is fully compatible with MagSafe charging.
features: Military-grade drop protection up to 10 feet (MIL-STD-810H)
Antimicrobial treatment reduces surface bacteria
MagSafe compatible for wireless charging and accessories
Frosted translucent design shows off your phone
Slim and lightweight profile for everyday carry

name: Belkin ScreenForce Grip Case for Google Pixel 8 Pro - Black
description: The Belkin ScreenForce Grip Case for Pixel 8 Pro combines a textured grip surface with edge-to-edge protection. Its precision-engineered design maintains full access to all ports and buttons while keeping the phone secure in your hand.
features: Textured grip surface prevents accidental drops
Raised edges protect screen and camera lens
Precision-cut openings for all ports and buttons
Slim design adds minimal bulk to your phone
Compatible with wireless charging

name: Belkin ScreenForce TemperedGlass Screen Protector for iPhone 15 Pro
description: Belkin's ScreenForce TemperedGlass protector provides edge-to-edge protection with 9H hardness for the iPhone 15 Pro. The included Easy Align tray ensures perfect, bubble-free installation every time.
features: 9H hardness tempered glass guards against scratches and impacts
Easy Align tray for perfect bubble-free installation
Edge-to-edge coverage with precision-cut design
Crystal-clear transparency preserves display quality
Touch sensitivity maintained for responsive use

name: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra Anti-Reflecting Screen Protector
description: Samsung's official anti-reflecting screen protector for the Galaxy S24 Ultra reduces glare and reflections for comfortable outdoor use. It maintains full compatibility with the S Pen and under-display fingerprint sensor.
features: Anti-reflection coating reduces glare in bright environments
Full compatibility with S Pen input
Works seamlessly with under-display fingerprint sensor
Self-healing surface resists minor scratches
Precise fit for Galaxy S24 Ultra display

name: Belkin ScreenForce UltraGlass 2 Screen Protector for Google Pixel 8
description: The Belkin ScreenForce UltraGlass 2 uses double ion-exchange strengthened glass for superior impact and scratch resistance on the Pixel 8. Its precision-engineered fit ensures full display coverage without interfering with the fingerprint reader.
features: Double ion-exchange strengthened glass for 2x stronger protection
Crystal-clear clarity preserves Pixel 8 display quality
Compatible with under-display fingerprint sensor
Easy Align installation frame included
Anti-microbial coating reduces bacteria on the surface

name: Anker Nano II 65W USB-C Fast Charger
description: The Anker Nano II 65W charger uses GaN II technology to deliver laptop-level power in a pocket-sized design. It charges iPhones, Samsung Galaxy phones, and even laptops with a single USB-C port and intelligent PowerIQ 3.0 technology.
features: 65W USB-C output charges phones, tablets, and laptops
GaN II technology for 58% smaller size than standard chargers
PowerIQ 3.0 intelligently adjusts power for any device
Foldable plug design for portability
ActiveShield 2.0 temperature monitoring for safety

name: Anker PowerLine III Flow USB-C to Lightning Cable - 6ft
description: The Anker PowerLine III Flow is an ultra-soft silicone cable that never tangles, built for fast charging iPhones at up to 20W. Its flexible design and 25,000-bend lifespan make it the last charging cable you will ever need.
features: Ultra-soft silicone exterior resists tangling
Supports up to 20W fast charging for iPhone
MFi certified for guaranteed Apple compatibility
25,000-bend lifespan for lasting durability
Available in 6ft length for flexible reach

name: Belkin BoostCharge Pro 3-in-1 Wireless Charger with MagSafe - Black
description: The Belkin BoostCharge Pro 3-in-1 charges your iPhone, Apple Watch, and AirPods simultaneously with official MagSafe support. Its premium design provides 15W fast wireless charging for iPhone and perfectly aligns your devices every time.
features: Charges iPhone, Apple Watch, and AirPods at the same time
Official MagSafe module delivers 15W fast wireless charging
Fast charge Apple Watch Series 7 and later
